comments.text: Thank you sir upload video telugu

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thanks for watching! We publish in English, but you can turn on auto-translated subtitles in the settings to follow along in Telugu. 🙏

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: I enjoy documentaries that make me curious enough to continue reading about the places afterward. This video definitely inspired me to learn much more about these destinations.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: I'm so glad to hear that this documentary sparked your curiosity to learn more!

comments.author: @RelaxHistoryAI
comments.text: The cliffs and coastal roads look incredible. Would you dare to drive around this island yourself?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Yes, I'd definitely drive them myself! It's an amazing experience.

comments.author: @荒木美桜-x1y
comments.text: Portugal really has some hidden gems. This floating garden is definitely one of em 🌺

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: @trueunrealglobe Thanks a lot for your appreciation! We will keep making these documentaries in the future!

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: It really is one of the Atlantic's best-kept secrets — a whole island of gardens rising out of the ocean. Thanks for watching! 🌺

replies.author: @trueunrealglobe
replies.text: There are so many travel channels on YouTube now, but very few focus on storytelling like this one. That's exactly what keeps bringing me back for every upload.

comments.author: @GladysRogene-s5g
comments.text: Lush forests AND dramatic cliffs, man… Madeira’s got it all, lol.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Ha, exactly — Madeira doesn't make you choose! Cliffs, forests and waterfalls all on one small island. 😄

comments.author: @XPlanet-TV
comments.text: Is this the island where CR7 comes from?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Yes, Cristiano Ronaldo is from Madeira.

comments.author: @JoyceLakota
comments.text: The drone shots over those sea cliffs just blew my mind. Madeira really looks like paradise on earth.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Glad those drone shots blew your mind! Madeira truly is a paradise, and I'm happy I could capture it for you.

comments.author: @EdanaOya
comments.text: I can't believe how green everything looks on the island, it's stunning!

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Right? Madeira stays green all year — those ancient laurel forests (laurisilva) are some of the last of their kind on Earth. Glad you enjoyed it!

comments.author: @JaneevaLouisa
comments.text: How come nobody talks about Madeira more?? The views are crazy beautiful and the culture seems cool af.

replies.author: @trueunrealglobe
replies.text: Thank you for creating documentaries that help people appreciate the beauty and diversity of our planet. Videos like these remind us there's always something extraordinary left to discover.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: It's definitely a hidden gem for many! Glad you enjoyed seeing the views and culture.

comments.author: @ErnestaElfreda
comments.text: Can’t get over the way the forest blends into the ocean. Kinda feels like somewhere from a fairy tale tbh.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: It really does have that magical quality, doesn't it? Madeira is truly a special place!

comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text: Thank you for exploring Madeira, Portugal’s floating garden, with us 🌿 If you enjoyed the journey, please like, share, and subscribe! 👉 What impressed you most about Madeira?

replies.author: @TerraVista-4K
replies.text: The development of the 'Digital Nomad Village' in Ponta do Sol sounds highly modern, but is Madeira actually losing its soul in the process? As the cost of living and housing prices get driven up, the locals—who genuinely define the island's culture—are being pushed to the margins to make way for high-earning, temporary neighbors from abroad. Is this true economic advancement, or just a new form of gentrification and cultural displacement?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
